name: Pigs in Blankets
recipeIngredient: 8 Regular-size hot dogs, cut into fourths
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cut each dinner roll into quarters.
3. Wrap each hot dog piece in one quarter of a roll.
4. Place the wrapped hot dogs on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Serve warm with ketchup and mustard if desired.
Source: Irene Rodriguez
Notes from the Chef:
"Here is my mother's twist on those little hot dogs wrapped in crescent rolls." - Lisa
